title: ROS Frameworks Dataset Schema
description: Schema for frameworks.csv in the awesome-ros repository

file name.description: Name of the ROS package or framework

package url.description: URL to the package repository or homepage

robot platforms.description: Target robot platforms (e.g. UGV, UAV, Manipulator)

robot stack.description: Robot stack layer (e.g. Perception, Planning, Control, Simulation)
